case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ROBERTO R. AVILA et al

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT AVILA, ROBERTO R.
